title: Batken Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Batken, with a Z-Score of +3.63. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Batken is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, and wind speed is moderate at 12.0 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, with no relief in sight, as indicated by the 0.0 HDD.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
